title: Append correction records for Feb 6 ghost settlements

cases: appendUtv2SettlementCorrections inserts additive correction rows and is idempotent

acceptance_criteria.additive_correction_rows: appendUtv2SettlementCorrections() inserts new settlement_records rows with corrects_id pointing to original
acceptance_criteria.no_mutation_of_originals: Original rows never updated — corrects_id FK pattern enforced
acceptance_criteria.idempotent: Second run detects existing corrects_id rows and skips both picks
acceptance_criteria.schema_invariant: settlement_records.corrects_id = correction FK; original row never mutated

runtime_change_note: Script is not deployed; run once manually against live DB after merge. Idempotent — safe to re-run.
